title: SEC Nigeria Meets with Stakeholders to Foster Collaboration and Growth - FinancialEDGE
description: Mandate Secretary Federal Capital Territory Authority Women Affairs Secretariat, Dr. Dayo Benjamins-Laniyi, Director General Securities and Exchange Commission Dr. Emomotimi Agama and Executive Commissioner Corporate Services SEC, Mrs. Samiya Usman during a meeting in Abuja, weekend.
html: Mandate Secretary Federal Capital Territory Authority Women Affairs Secretariat, Dr. Dayo Benjamins-Laniyi, Director General Securities and Exchange Commission Dr. Emomotimi Agama and Executive Commissioner Corporate Services SEC, Mrs. Samiya Usman during a meeting in Abuja, weekend.
